rationale:
Missing `docs/helix/02-design/` design note capturing D1/D2 policy and UI scope.
Missing project-local persona support in `cli/internal/persona`, including `.ddx/personas/*.md` discovery, source tagging, override precedence, and unit coverage.
Missing GraphQL schema and resolver additions for `personaCreate`, `personaUpdate`, and `personaDelete`.
Missing CLI commands `ddx persona new`, `ddx persona edit`, `ddx persona fork`, and `ddx persona delete`, plus shared operation plumbing with GraphQL.
Missing UI implementation for personas explainer copy, source badges, project persona lifecycle actions, library fork action, and empty project-local hint.
Missing Playwright and integration tests for the required UI, GraphQL, CLI, binding regression, and empty-state behavior.
